title: inula candida subsp. verbascifolia
intro: Inula candida subsp. verbascifolia, also known as the golden samphire or verbascifolia, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Inula candida subsp. verbascifolia has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile addition to natural remedies.
